sourceMovie.title: Hanna
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hanna works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Expendables
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hanna clicked for you, The Expendables (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hanna?
faq.answer: Try The Expendables, Anna, Retribution—each shares DNA with Hanna while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hanna?
faq.answer: Hanna (2011) is best described as Action, Thriller, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hanna worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
